top_signals.title: US Strikes India-Crewed Tanker That May Have Been Iran-Bound
top_signals.summary: The US military fired at an empty tanker for its suspected involvement in the Iranian oil trade this week as Washington continues to enforce a blockade of the Islamic Republic’s ports.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: New Shai-Hulud attack trojanizes 19 science-focused PyPI packages
top_signals.summary: Hackers compromised 19 packages on the PyPI, collectively downloaded hundreds of thousands of times, in a new Shai-Hulud supply-chain attack that delivered malware designed to steal developer secrets. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Maybank Handles $4.9 Billion of Deals for Johor Zone
top_signals.summary: Malayan Banking Bhd said the Johor-Singapore special economic zone will drive further expansion, with Malaysia’s biggest lender having facilitated about 20 billion ringgit ($4.9 billion) in financing and investments in the area in the past couple of years.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Intesa CEO Says Monte Paschi Could Open Path to European Deals
top_signals.summary: Intesa Sanpaolo SpA Chief Executive Officer Carlo Messina said a successful takeover on Banca Monte dei Paschi di Siena SpA would position his bank to engage in deals across Europe.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: ‘Picks and shovels’ companies profit from data centre scramble
top_signals.summary: Caterpillar and Hochtief among the once-staid industrial stocks lifted by the AI boom
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Japanese sailor sets course for around-the-world yacht race
top_signals.summary: If Masatomo Suzuki completes the 2028 Vendee Globe, an event known as "the Everest of the seas," he would become the second Japanese person to achieve the feat.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
